purpose: Freeze the post-detector evidence analyzer contract for the repeated-object relation-anchor consistency branch after planner, frame/projection, and detector/SAM2 substrate gates passed.

problem.fact: The repeated-object branch has detector-backed target/context observations, but repeated same-category candidates still need consistency interpretation across own-view, relation-anchor context-view, and orthogonal-axis challenge-view roles.
problem.agent_inference: Candidate association alone is insufficient because target support, context leakage, and repeated-object ambiguity can all occur in the same scene/query slice.
problem.not_a_paper_claim: This contract freezes a nonterminal analyzer; it does not authorize candidate commit, candidate rejection, first_eval rerun, or policy-scale comparison.

design_scope.input_scope: All 27 detector-backed observation rows and all 360 candidate-heading association rows from the frozen repeated-object relation-anchor consistency detector substrate.
design_scope.allowed_label_use: Evaluation labels may be joined only after view, pair, candidate, request, and summary evidence rows are written.
allowed_action_inputs: candidate-specific projected-pixel, mask, box, depth-agreement, and association fields
non-GT candidate rank and candidate geometry
request, scene, query, episode, and decision identifiers

evidence_definitions.target_support: For a view row, the target candidate has at least one associated_to_candidate true association row.
evidence_definitions.context_support: For a view row, any non-target selected candidate has at least one associated_to_candidate true association row.
evidence_definitions.candidate_specific_support_role: A required role where target_support is true and context_support is false.
evidence_definitions.context_leakage_role: A required role where context_support is true, regardless of target_support.
evidence_definitions.orthogonal_axis_contradiction: An orthogonal-axis challenge view where target support is absent or non-target context support is present.
evidence_definitions.stable_relation_anchor_consistency_candi: A candidate has target support in candidate_own_view and relation_anchor_context_view, has no context leakage in relation_anchor_context_view or orthogonal_axis_challenge_view, and has no orthogonal_axis_contradiction.
evidence_definitions.ambiguous_repeated_object_candidate: A candidate has target support but context leakage or multiple same-request candidates satisfy the stable candidate rule.
evidence_definitions.insufficient_candidate_evidence: A candidate is missing target support in any required role needed by the stable candidate rule.
evidence_definitions.promotable_branch_outcome: Exactly one candidate in a request satisfies stable_relation_anchor_consistency_candidate and no same-request candidate is contradicted only by missing detector evidence. This outcome only permits a later terminal-utility contract design; it does not permit a commit here.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: commit_if_any_target_association
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether raw detector association repeats the original semantic-map overcommit failure.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: commit_if_own_view_supported
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether own-view evidence alone is sufficient under repeated same-category ambiguity.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: commit_if_relation_anchor_context_supported
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether relation-anchor context support alone confuses co-visible repeated objects with goal validity.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: association_count_best
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether selecting the candidate with the largest associated heading count is a valid-goal shortcut.

next_step_if_passed: Implement and Docker-run the analyzer, then decide whether the branch produced a promotable nonterminal outcome or another residual failure mechanism.
next_step_if_failed: Diagnose role coverage, target/context association leakage, or detector association consistency before changing thresholds or designing terminal utility.

interpretation_rule.fact: The contract freezes a nonterminal post-detector analyzer after detector/SAM2 substrate passed.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: This branch tests whether repeated-object semantic uncertainty can be reduced by relation-anchor consistency evidence rather than by raw detector association.
interpretation_rule.paper_claim: No paper claim is allowed from this contract alone.
